name: golang-go.opencensus-dev
title: golang-go.opencensus-dev
summary: Stats collection and distributed tracing framework
description:
Stats collection and distributed tracing framework
OpenCensus Go is a Go implementation of OpenCensus, a toolkit for
collecting application performance and behavior monitoring data.
Currently it consists of three major components: tags, stats and tracing.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-go.opencensus-dev because Stats collection and distributed tracing framework.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-go.opencensus-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-go.opencensus-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-go.opencensus-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
